PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2023 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-12-2022 Continued To Jan-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Somita Basu, via Zoom, for Corevia Turner-Flynn, Personal Representative.

Upon query by the court, counsel reports of delays due to the complicated nature of the Estate and that there is a petition pending in the court's e-filing queue.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Jan-09-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to confirm the filing of the pending petition.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Amended Petition For Letters Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-01-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted there were issues in this matter and has some questions. There being no appearances, the court orders the status of filing an amended petition for letters of administration off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: S. Le. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-23-2020 Continued To Mar-29-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sil Vossler, Esq., counsel for Corevia Turner-Flynn, Executor (appearing by video conference).

The Court notes extensive Examiner Notes to which no response was received. Mr. Vossler advises the Court that after his review of the Notes he concludes an amended Petition will need to be filed. When so queried by the Court, Mr. Vossler advises that the delay has been occasioned by litigation concerning the father's trust and various creditor issues of the decedent. Mr. Vossler is without knowledge of the age of one Walton Flynn.

After further discussion, the Court sets hearing for status of the filing of the amended Petition for Letters of Administration for March 1, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 and continues the current matter to March 29, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The latter hearing will be taken off calendar if the amended Petition is on file by that date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Court Examiner: Sandra Hilton; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
